bibliography.sourceIntroLead: {{disease}} — every paper the engine read and scored on the latest run, including what it
bibliography.auditLogTitle: This is an audit log of what the engine read — not a recommendation list.
bibliography.negativePathLead: The value is in the negative paths: you can see
bibliography.negativePathTail: land on the source shelf or become a suggestion. Nothing here is for patient management.
bibliography.emptyTitle: No analyzed run yet for this disease.
bibliography.emptyDesc: Run the source-shelf builder and literature monitor first; the verdict ledger appears here after a pipeline run.
bibliography.funnelUsedDesc: on shelf or as a suggestion
bibliography.changeLikelihoodTooltip: Estimated chance this paper would change the guideline
bibliography.footNote: Refreshed on each shelf-build and literature-monitor run. Verdicts may change when new evidence appears or triage is tuned.

flowchart.notAvailableDesc: A step-by-step guide for families and patients has not been generated for this condition yet.
flowchart.hint: Work through the steps in order. Tap a highlighted action to see who to contact, what to expect, and questions you can ask — you can read them from your phone at the appointment.
flowchart.nextVisitDesc: Choose a highlighted action in the steps on the left. We will show who can help, what usually happens, and what to ask — so you do not have to remember everything alone.
flowchart.actionUrgent: URGENT — contact your care team today
flowchart.actionLead: You chose this step — here is how to move forward.
flowchart.actionQuestionsLabel: Questions to ask (you can read these aloud)
flowchart.actionEvidenceGap: Evidence for this step is limited in the current guideline — confirm with your care team.

route.notFoundDesc: This route is not implemented yet. Use the header to navigate home.
